paneContent:
‚îî 4 lines...

‚óè Now signal done:

‚óè Signal completion (shell)
  ‚îÇ cd /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/.worktrees/4.3.0--prompt-widget && npx
  ‚îÇ storyboard agent signal --status done --message "Replaced hidden CropPanel with
  ‚îÇ floating bar. Dark translucent bar hovers above crop region, follows handles, flips
  ‚îÇ below when near top. Added Escape key to cancel. Save/Undo/Cancel buttons always
  ‚îÇ visible."
  ‚îî 3 lines...

‚óè Done. Here's what I changed:

  Problem: The old CropPanel was positioned top: 100% below the frame, but parent
  overflow: hidden clipped it ‚Äî making it invisible and trapping users in crop mode.

  Fix:

   - Replaced the panel with a floating bar (dark translucent + backdrop-blur) that
  hovers above the crop region
   - Bar follows the crop selection as you drag handles
   - Flips below when near the top edge
   - Added Escape key to cancel crop mode
   - Buttons: ‚úì Save (green), ‚Ü© Undo, ‚úï Cancel + live dimensions

 ~/workspace/st... [‚éá 4.3.0--prompt-widget*%]
